description:
60cm Integrated Dishwasher Code: DF63

This Fully Integrated Dishwasher operates quietly at 49dBa noise level. It has 4 programmes, 12 place settings, 12 litre water consumption and an adjustable top basket.

Key Features:

  • Four Programmes
  • Twelve Place Settings
  • Twelve Litre Water Consumption
  • 49dBa Maximum Noise Level
  • Adjustable Top Basket
  • Overflow And Leakage Protection
  • Product Dimensions: H820 x W600 x D550 mm
  • Three Year Warranty - subject to registration with Nordmende
